title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.240 - Board shall not exempt any person from any tax
text:
94.240.  Board shall not exempt any person from any tax. — The mayor and board of aldermen shall have no power to release any person from the payment of any tax, or exempt any person from any burden imposed by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 7163) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7013; 1919 § 8464; 1909 § 9366
